caption:
The campus gates locked at midnight, but my heels clicked against the marble floor as I pushed open the library doors. 🌙👠 I wasn't just here for my 3am study group; I was here for *you*

Professor Elena Vance knew exactly how to make her presence felt. My pencil skirt hugging every curve, my blazer tied tight around my waist, and that white blouse barely containing my assets—I was dressed for a lecture, not a seduction. Yet, the air between us crackled as I approached the round table where the only male student who'd stayed after class was waiting.

" You're early," I purred, adjusting my glasses, my eyes glinting with mischief. 📚✨

He stood up, my scent hitting him—vanilla and ambition. We moved close, the space between us shrinking. The soft hum of the AC masked our breathing as my fingers traced the rim of his coffee cup. The skirt rode up slightly when I shifted, but the fabric hid everything I wanted to show, making every movement a secret promise.

"Most students leave by noon," I whispered, leaning in so close my chest brushed his shoulder. "But I know you like trouble."

He laughed, a deep rumble that made my stomach flip. "Maybe tonight, I'll let you teach me something new."

The library lights dimmed, just like the fire in his gaze. I knew this session would go beyond the curriculum. 🍷💋

#UniversityLife #ProfessorVibes #LateNightStudy #SexyTeacher #CampusLife #Confidence #Curves #Allure #InstaStory #MidnightMagic
